issue_summary: Support class loading by name for multidimensional arrays
javadoc_before: /** * Load a class by its fully qualified name, using the supplied * {@link ClassLoader}. * @param name the fully qualified name of the class to load; never * {@code null} or blank * @param classLoader the {@code ClassLoader} to use; never {@code null} * @see #loadClass(String) */
javadoc_after:
/** * Load a class by its primitive name or fully qualified name, * using the supplied {@link ClassLoader}. * *

Class names for arrays may be specified using either the JVM's internal * String representation (e.g., {@code [[I} for {@code int[][]}, * {@code [Lava.lang.String;} for {@code java.lang.String[]}, etc.) or * source code syntax (e.g., {@code int[][]}, {@code java.lang.String[]}, * etc.). * * @param name the name of the class to load; never {@code null} or blank * @param classLoader the {@code ClassLoader} to use; never {@code null} * @see #loadClass(String) */
